title: thespesia acutiloba
intro: Thespesia acutiloba, also known as the bitter thespesia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Malvaceae. It has been traditionally used in various parts of the world for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and fever. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Thespesia acutiloba include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which can be used in traditional medicine to address various health conditions.
